recommendations.title: The Big 4
recommendations.overview: A by-the-book female detective teams up with four down-on-their-luck assassins to investigate her father's murder.

recommendations.title: The Shadow Strays
recommendations.overview: Skilled in the art of killing, a young assassin defies her mentor to save a boy from a ruthless crime syndicate — and she'll destroy anyone in her path.

recommendations.title: The Night Comes for Us
recommendations.overview: After sparing a girl's life during a massacre, an elite Triad assassin is targeted by an onslaught of murderous gangsters.

recommendations.title: Killers
recommendations.overview: A psychotic executive triggers a journalist's dark side, and they begin to form a strange bond through the internet.

recommendations.title: Nobody 2
recommendations.overview: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a nostalgic vacation to a small-town theme park, only to be pulled back into violence when they clash with a corrupt operator, a crooked sheriff, and a ruthless crime boss.

recommendations.title: May the Devil Take You
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find answers to her estranged father's mysterious illness, a young woman visits his old villa and uncovers a horrifying truth from the past.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/94
recommendations.overview: After the discovery of a mysterious VHS tape, a brutish police SWAT team launches a high-intensity raid on a remote warehouse, only to discover a sinister cult compound whose collection of pre-recorded material uncovers a nightmarish conspiracy.
recommendations.director: Simon Barrett, Steven Kostanski, Chloe Okuno, Timo Tjahjanto, Jennifer Reeder, Ryan Prows

recommendations.title: Maria Full of Grace
recommendations.overview: A pregnant Colombian teenager becomes a drug mule to make some desperately needed money for her family.

recommendations.title: Swiss Army Man

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2

recommendations.director: Gareth Evans, Eduardo Sánchez, Timo Tjahjanto, Jason Eisener, Adam Wingard, Gregg Hale, Simon Barrett
